name: antigravity-opencode
description: Google Antigravity 2.0 OAuth Provider for OpenCode

scripts.install-plugin: tsc && bun build src/index.ts --target=node --minify --outfile=dist/agy-auth-oc.js && mkdir -p ~/.config/opencode/plugins && cp dist/agy-auth-oc.js ~/.config/opencode/plugins/agy-auth-oc.js
